risk_title: Delayed SRGBV Training Implementation Affecting Violence Prevention
risk_summary: Sexual and reproductive gender-based violence (SRGBV) training for 2,000 school management committees and boards of governors was scheduled for January-February 2025 but has been rescheduled to April 2025, delaying critical violence prevention capacity building in schools.
evidence_quote: SRGBV Training for 2000 (SMCs, BOGs) Jan-Feb 2025... Planning will start in January to commence in April

risk_title: Incomplete GBV Response and Safeguarding Framework
risk_summary: Multiple critical safeguarding activities remain not started, including GBV/SEA/SH refresher training, social audits, and accountability frameworks for GBV response, creating gaps in institutional capacity to address violence in schools.
evidence_quote: Conduct GBV/SEA/SH refresher training 31-Mar-25... not started; Mid-term review of social audit findings 28-Feb-25... not started; outline a clear accountability framework for those working in GBV response/mitigation... 28-Feb-25... not started

risk_summary: Development of school safety standards, critical for protecting students from violence and conflict-related threats, remains incomplete despite a February 2025 deadline.
evidence_quote: Develop school safety standards 28-Feb-25... Draft completed

risk_title: Stalled Social Audit Implementation for Accountability
risk_summary: Social audits to assess institutional accountability and safeguarding mechanisms have not been initiated, delaying evidence-based identification of governance and violence-related vulnerabilities.
evidence_quote: Supervise consultants conducting social audits 31-Jan-25... not started

risk_summary: Follow-up visits to Grievance Redress Mechanisms (GRMs) and Grievance Redress Committees (GRCs) post-protocol rollout are contingent on completion of training, creating delays in monitoring institutional responsiveness to conflict and violence complaints.
evidence_quote: Follow-up visits to GRMs/GRCs post-protocol roll-out 31-Mar-25... contingent upon completion of training

risk_title: Incomplete Male Engagement Strategy for GBV Prevention
risk_summary: Identification of male gender equality champions and development of a male engagement approach for GBV prevention and response remains incomplete, limiting comprehensive violence prevention efforts.
evidence_quote: Identify male gender equality champions from MBSSE and develop an action plan to pilot male engagement approach towards GBV prevention and response 28-Feb-25... to be during the training
